name: Silver Pegasus Acquisition Corp.
summary: Silver Pegasus Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated on June 5, 2024 as a Cayman Islands exempted company. It was formed to effect a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to focus on the technology sector, specifically semiconductors and systems solutions, targeting companies with enterprise values in the range of $200-$500 million.

partnerships.description: Representative of the underwriters in the IPO; also participated in private placement purchasing placement warrants.
Sponsor of Silver Pegasus Acquisition Corp., a Delaware limited liability company that purchased founder shares and placement warrants.
